title: Hobbycast Episode 4: Seven things I like about MORK BORG
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UCaZFYzYm9k

Daniel (@dungeondive) presents seven reasons why Mörk Borg stands out, particularly when paired with Solitary Defilement. He highlights the rules-light system that creates space for roleplay, the atmospheric art that reinforces theme, the structured approach of Solitary Defilement for board gamers, the liberal third-party licensing enabling massive community content, the dark humor and absurdity of the setting, the inevitable apocalypse mechanic that adds urgency, and the thematic leveling system where characters can improve or deteriorate. These elements combine to create a uniquely engaging experience that appeals to both traditional RPG players and board gamers.

----

Which aspect of Mörk Borg appeals most to you—the mechanics, the theme, or the community content ecosystem?
